differential_diagnoses: Primary cardiac diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
next_steps: Perform 18F-FDG PET-CT scan to evaluate metabolic activity and systemic involvement
Perform image-guided biopsy (via EBUS-TBNA of mediastinal lymph nodes or CT-guided biopsy of the cardiac mass)
Perform pericardiocentesis for cytology, flow cytometry, and mycobacterial/fungal studies
Initiate urgent histopathological examination of biopsy tissue
Continue anticoagulation therapy for pulmonary embolism and mass-related thrombosis risk
Multidisciplinary review by oncology, cardiology, and cardiothoracic surgery teams
